steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a meaningful contrast between the two sculptures. The most significant difference is subject matter: Frudakis's Freedom Sculpture depicts human figures, while McCracken's Diminish and Ascend depicts an architectural element.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'false contrast or shared trait': does not accurately identify a distinguishing difference between the two works. ✗
  • Choice B — 'human subjects vs. no human subjects': correctly identifies that Frudakis's work includes human figures while McCracken's does not. ✓
  • Choice C — 'describes only one sculpture': does not establish a contrast between the two. ✗
  • Choice D — 'shared characteristics': emphasizes similarity rather than contrast. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
